objective: Add docstrings to the public helper functions `run_git`, `calculate_quality_score`, and `attest_controller_action` in `glitchlab/controller_utils.py` to document their inputs, outputs, and side effects.
commit_message: docs: add helper docstrings in controller utils
implementation_summary: Added input/output/side-effect docstrings to the public helper functions run_git, calculate_quality_score, and attest_controller_action in glitchlab/controller_utils.py, and verified the file compiles.

data.description: Covers the public helper behavior in controller_utils by asserting run_git delegates to subprocess with captured text output, calculate_quality_score returns the expected scoring summary, and attest_controller_action suppresses failure/error summaries while emitting the expected success event payload.
